defaultResults.name: risk_data_quality_review
defaultResults.description: Aggregated data-quality review signal derived from Cotality market records.

defaultResults.name: gold_trade_promotion_roi
defaultResults.description: The trade promotion ROI analysis tables appear to be a collection of three related tables that provide insights into the effectiveness of trade promotions for retail products and vendors. The first table includes columns such as promotion IDs, names, types, funding types, start and end dates, promotion durations, and funding suppliers, suggesting that it stores information about the promotions themselves, including their characteristics and timing. The second table focuses on the products being promoted, with columns such as product names, brand names, categories, vendor funding, promoted units, revenue, and margin, indicating that it tracks the performance of individual products in relation to trade promotions. The third table seems to provide a more detailed analysis of the promotions'' impact, with columns like total discount given, promotional transactions, average daily baseline units, unit lift percentage, and trade ROI, which imply that it calculates the return on investment (ROI) of trade promotions and assesses their overall effectiveness. By combining these tables, users can gain a comprehensive understanding of the trade promotion landscape, including the types of promotions being run, the products being promoted, the funding sources, and the resulting revenue and profitability. The tables likely use primary keys such as promotion IDs and product IDs to uniquely identify each promotion and product, and may use foreign keys to link the tables together, enabling users to analyze the relationships between promotions, products, and vendors. Overall, these tables provide a robust framework for analyzing the effectiveness of trade promotions and optimizing future promotional strategies.

defaultResults.name: gold_trade_fund_summary
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (supplier_id, fund_type). Trade fund utilization summary showing allocated vs accrued vs settled amounts by supplier. Use for vendor fund management, settlement tracking, and accrual reconciliation.

defaultResults.name: gold_trade_deduction_aging
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (supplier_id, deduction_type, deduction_status). Trade deduction aging analysis with 30/60/90/90+ day buckets. Use for accounts receivable management, dispute resolution tracking, and supplier compliance monitoring.

defaultResults.name: gold_supply_chain_kpi
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per supplier. Aggregated supply chain KPIs by supplier: fill rate, average lead time, on-time delivery rate, and rejection rate. Excludes cancelled POs.

defaultResults.name: gold_store_performance
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (fiscal_year, fiscal_period, location_id). Store-level P&L, format comparison, and banner benchmarking. Includes sales_per_sqft for productivity analysis. Excludes returns.

defaultResults.name: gold_sales_daily
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (transaction_date, product_id, location_id). Pre-aggregated daily sales view from fact_transaction_line. Excludes returns (is_return = False). Primary view for daily/weekly/fiscal period sales reporting and Genie Q&A on sales performance.

defaultResults.name: gold_sales_by_tender
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (transaction_date, location_id, tender_type). Payment method analysis — cash vs credit vs digital wallet trends. Aggregated from fact_transaction_header with dim_date and dim_location.

defaultResults.name: gold_sales_by_daypart
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (transaction_date, location_id, daypart). Hour-of-day and day-part analysis for labor scheduling and merchandising. Dayparts: EARLY_MORNING (6-8), MORNING (9-11), LUNCH (12-14), AFTERNOON (15-17), EVENING (18-20), LATE (21-23).

defaultResults.name: gold_rmn_campaign_performance
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per ad campaign. RMN campaign performance dashboard with impressions, clicks, CTR, viewability, spend, attributed revenue, and ROAS. Join to dim_supplier for advertiser details.

defaultResults.name: gold_rmn_audience_reach
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (audience_segment, campaign_type, placement_type). PII-free RMN audience reach analysis showing engagement rates by customer segment. Use for audience targeting optimization and media planning.

defaultResults.name: gold_rmn_advertiser_roi
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (advertiser_id, brand_name). RMN advertiser ROI analysis comparing ad spend to attributed revenue and organic sales. Use for media sales pitch, rate card optimization, and advertiser retention.

defaultResults.name: gold_replenishment_pipeline
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id). In-flight stock visibility — open PO qty, in-transit qty, and projected stock. Combines gold_inventory_snapshot with open PO lines and unreceipted ASNs.

defaultResults.name: gold_receipt_compliance
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per receipt line (receipt_id, product_id). Receipt compliance view comparing received quantities against ASN shipped quantities. Flags over/under shipments and calculates days early/late vs expected arrival.

defaultResults.name: gold_promo_product_detail
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (promotion_id, product_id, location_id). Promotion effectiveness at SKU level — which products respond to which promos. Includes promoted units, sales, margin, and discount depth. Excludes returns.

defaultResults.name: gold_promo_performance
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per promotion. Promotional performance view measuring discount depth, promoted sales, and margin impact. Use funding_type to allocate costs for vendor co-op reconciliation.

defaultResults.name: gold_price_current
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id, price_type). Active price list with cost and margin spread. Filtered to is_current = TRUE prices only.

defaultResults.name: gold_po_lifecycle
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per PO line (po_number, line_number). Purchase order lifecycle view with lead time, fill rate, and PO age metrics. Joins PO header/line to receipts and dimensions for end-to-end procurement visibility.

defaultResults.name: gold_margin_analysis
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (fiscal_year, fiscal_period, category, brand, banner, region). Category profitability view with gross margin, discount depth, and productivity metrics. Requires cost_amt population in fact_transaction_line for accurate margin calculations.

defaultResults.name: gold_loyalty_program
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (loyalty_tier, transaction_type). PII-free loyalty program economy view. Shows earn/burn/bonus/expiry patterns by loyalty tier. Use for program health monitoring, tier migration analysis, and liability estimation.

defaultResults.name: gold_inventory_snapshot
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id) showing the LATEST inventory snapshot. stock_status is OOS | LOW_STOCK | IN_STOCK. Primary view for on-shelf availability analysis and Genie Q&A on inventory.

defaultResults.name: gold_inventory_health
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id) — latest snapshot. ABC classification, reorder alerts, and dead stock identification. Includes 30-day velocity, annualized inventory turns, and reorder/dead stock flags.

defaultResults.name: gold_forecast_vs_inventory
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id). Demand-supply balance analysis combining forecast demand with current inventory and supply pipeline. Identifies at-risk SKU/locations where forecasted demand exceeds available supply plus pipeline. Use for proactive replenishment decisions.

defaultResults.name: gold_forecast_accuracy
defaultResults.description: The table in question appears to be a comprehensive repository for monitoring and evaluating the accuracy of forecast models used in retail demand forecasting, with a focus on product-level predictions. It contains a range of columns that facilitate detailed analysis, including product IDs, names, and categories, as well as location IDs and names, which enable the examination of forecast performance across different products and geographical locations. The inclusion of forecast dates, model names, and versions allows for the tracking of model performance over time and the comparison of different models, which is crucial for bias detection and A/B testing. The table also incorporates key metrics such as absolute percentage error, which measures the difference between predicted and actual sales, and indicators of whether the forecast falls within a 95% confidence interval, providing insight into the reliability and precision of the forecasts. By comparing predicted demand to actual sales data, this table enables the assessment of model performance, the identification of biases, and the evaluation of different forecast models through A/B testing, ultimately supporting data-driven decision-making in retail operations. With its rich metadata and detailed metrics, this table serves as a valuable tool for refining forecast models, improving demand forecasting accuracy, and optimizing retail product management.

defaultResults.name: gold_demand_features
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id, transaction_date). Real-time demand feature engineering view for ML model training. Computes rolling sales windows, promotional context, and calendar features directly from canonical tables. Use as training data for demand forecast models.

defaultResults.name: gold_customer_segments
defaultResults.description: Customer segments based on purchase behavior and demographic characteristics. This table includes information about customer counts, average scores, lifetime spend, transaction counts, and recency days for different segments.

defaultResults.name: gold_customer_ltv
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (enrollment_cohort_year, cohort_quarter, months_since_enrollment). PII-free cohort retention and LTV analysis. Tracks cumulative spend by enrollment cohort over 24 months. Use for LTV modeling, retention curve analysis, and loyalty program ROI.

defaultResults.name: gold_customer_basket
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (transaction_date, location, channel, loyalty_indicator). Basket-level metrics aggregated by channel and loyalty status. PII-FREE: customer_id and loyalty_id are intentionally excluded. Use dim_customer directly (with appropriate access controls) for individual-level analytics.

defaultResults.name: gold_customer_360
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per active customer. PII table — contains customer_id, loyalty_id, household_id. Requires row-level security or column masking for non-privileged access. Combines purchase behavior, engagement metrics, and loyalty attributes into a unified customer profile.

defaultResults.name: gold_cross_domain
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (transaction_date, product_id, location_id). Cross-domain view combining sales + inventory + promotional context. Designed for Genie Q&A covering multi-domain questions such as: `Which products are selling well but running out of stock? or` `What is the inventory impact of promoted products?`

defaultResults.name: fact_transaction_line
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per transaction line item. Core POS sales fact — the primary table for sales, basket, and margin analytics. Always filter is_return = False for net forward sales; include for gross/net analysis. gross_margin_amt is populated when cost data is available from fact_price or ERP. Liquid-clustered on transaction_date + location_id + product_id for typical analytic access patterns.

defaultResults.name: fact_transaction_header
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per retail transaction (basket / web order). Header-level sales fact. Join to fact_transaction_line on transaction_id for line-item detail. customer_id and loyalty_id are PII when present; anonymous transactions have NULL in both. is_return = True rows represent refund transactions; negate amounts for net sales calculations.

defaultResults.name: fact_trade_fund
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per trade fund allocation event. CPG Trade Promotion Management fact capturing trade fund commitments from CPG manufacturers to retailers for promotional activities. supplier_id links to the CPG manufacturer; promotion_id links to the promotional event.

defaultResults.name: fact_trade_deduction
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per deduction/chargeback event. CPG Trade Promotion Management fact capturing deductions that retailers withhold from supplier invoice payments. fund_id links to the trade fund; supplier_id links to the supplier being charged.

defaultResults.name: fact_receipt
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per receiving event line. Goods receipt fact capturing inbound receiving at DC or store. Links to fact_asn via asn_id and to purchase orders via po_number. receipt_status indicates receiving quality: RECEIVED (full), PARTIAL, or DAMAGED.

defaultResults.name: fact_purchase_order_line
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per PO line item (product per PO). Detail-level procurement fact. Join to fact_purchase_order_header on po_number. open_qty tracks outstanding quantities for receipt matching. line_status reflects receipt progress against the ordered quantity.

defaultResults.name: fact_purchase_order_header
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per purchase order. Header-level procurement fact capturing order placement, expected delivery, and current status. Join to fact_purchase_order_line on po_number for line-item detail. total_order_amt is reconciled from the sum of line_amt across all PO lines.

defaultResults.name: fact_price
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id, price_type) effective time period. Price history fact table — join to transaction lines by time-window for accurate margin calculation. For zone pricing, location_id may represent a pricing zone rather than a physical store.

defaultResults.name: fact_loyalty_transaction
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per loyalty point event. CDP / Customer 360 fact capturing loyalty program point transactions including earn, burn, adjust, expire, and bonus events. customer_id and loyalty_id are PII. reference_id links to POS transactions or campaigns.

defaultResults.name: fact_inventory_position
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id, snapshot_date). End-of-day inventory position snapshot — the primary table for availability, OOS, and replenishment analytics. is_out_of_stock is the key KPI flag for shelf availability. days_of_supply is computed from recent daily velocity; NULL when velocity is unavailable. Liquid-clustered on snapshot_date + location_id + product_id.

defaultResults.name: fact_demand_forecast
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id, forecast_date, model_name). Model prediction output table for demand forecasting. Includes point forecast, 95% prediction interval, and model metadata. forecast_horizon indicates days ahead from model_run_date.

defaultResults.name: fact_demand_feature
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per (product_id, location_id, feature_date). Pre-computed ML features for demand forecasting. Materialized daily by the feature pipeline. Includes rolling sales windows, trend/seasonality signals, promotion context, inventory context, and calendar features.

defaultResults.name: fact_customer_event
defaultResults.description: Grain: one row per customer interaction event. CDP / Customer 360 fact capturing multi-channel customer engagement events including email, SMS, app, loyalty, and survey interactions. customer_id is PII. revenue_attributed is populated only for purchase events.
